eas_text: A civil authority has issued A BLUE ALERT for the following counties or areas: South Carolina; at 09:03 PM ON APR 20, 2026 Effective until 10:03 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The South Carolina State Law Enforcement Division has issued a Blue Alert on behalf of Barnwell County. Suspect Lacey Cushman female, white 5- 9 200 lbs.  Last seen driving a 2011 white Chevrolet Traverse in Barnwell County. If seen, please contact 911.
